lines: After the child's copybook, the bodies make sense. The cultists wear red cloth at the cuff and throat.
Wolf hair is caught in the buckles. The bite marks came from the road grass, not from the cave mouth.
The pack was not hunting the Carbo family. It came for the men who nailed them to the yard posts.
Charcoal darkens one wheel rut. Several bare tracks and the cart trail continue west.
Dead cultists and torn wolf bodies lie near the cave mouth. The tracks cross too many times to read cleanly.
The cult cloth is shredded at the cuff and throat. Whatever happened here began before the cave swallowed the trail.
Charcoal darkens one wheel rut. Several bare tracks and the cart trail continue west.
